summary: Stage C exploration tested 2 expansion-tier sources to address persistent Social category gap (6%). Pew Research Center produced 2 signals (federal workforce decline, data center public opinion). Social category gap remains structural: global crisis signals (Hormuz energy, Middle East conflict, AI infrastructure) dominate. Recommend adding labor/workforce-focused sources in next cycle.
